completionRule: Course 5 visual material is considered indexed for review when every low-text or deferred PDF has representative page samples and a queue row. This still does not equal OCR-complete, learner-facing, publication-cleared, or human-approved teaching content.
boundary: Course 5 visual review samples are private reviewer-facing education research only.
